SUBJECT: Stomper Launch 2.0: time to roll...


NAME,

OK, as I mentioned a few days ago, we have
another HUGE launch coming.

Well, it's time to roll... but I want to tell
you WHY this launch is going to be huge: 

1. We have an unmatched track record. Every
time we launch, we generate seven-figure days
for affiliates. The original StomperNet
launch was the largest in IM history.

2. We have a GREAT product... and it's the 
right product at the right time - we are
calling it SMARTS, and it's a complete
coaching program about using Social Media to
drive big profits. This stuff is red hot.

3. We have Jeff Walker on board - as you
know, he's THE guy for Product Launches. In
fact, he created this entire "launch 
phenomenon" with his Product Launch Formula.
Jeff is helping us with strategy and copy,
and is 100% on board for this launch.


4. To complete the "dream team", we're also
getting some unofficial help from Frank Kern.
As you probably know, Frank was the go-to guy
for our copy (and much more) in the first
StomperNet launch. 

5. When Jeff and Frank work together, the
results are crazy. We go live on January 8th
- will this be the biggest launch of 2008...
just eight days into the year? If I was a
betting man, I would say "yes". 

6. We have the entire Stomper faculty onboard, 

ready to create AMAZING free content to set up the
launch. We already snuck a first video out to our
internal StomperNet list, and the feedback
has been incredible. 

7. We have an INSANE new viral marketing tool
for you to use - we will be deploying this in
just a few days... it's just another way for
you to make bigger commissions from people
who aren't even on your list! (More on that 
in a few days...)

8. We are going to be tracking leads by
opt-in, so when you mail early in the
pre-launch, you will still get credit when we
go live on January 8th.

Bottom line... we are going to give you 
cutting edge free content to promote. And
then we are going to convert the traffic you
send us into big affiliate commissions. 


    >>> What To Do Right Now <<<

We have a new video for you to promote - it's 
pure content and it's ALREADY getting rave
reviews. You can see the video here:

http://www.stompernet.net/jvp/aw.aspx?B=25&A=[dynamically insert AFFcode here]


And look at the comments we're getting on the video: 

http://www.stomperblog.com



When you send people to that video, we will
tag them with your cookie.

And when they opt-in, we will track that lead
for you by their email address and send them 
back to your affiliate link with our future
emails.

Here is your affiliate link to the video:

http://www.stompernet.net/jvp/aw.aspx?B=25&A=[dynamically insert AFFcode here]


I've included swipe copy for you to use
below. Just cut and paste this and send it to 
your list. Or you can customize the copy for
your list.

Either way, send it out NOW... since we are
tracking by email address, the people who
mail early are going to crush it...

REMEMBER: the swipe copy is down below... 


best regards,
Andy Jenkins
